body:
## Problem

Tool sub-pages are sitemapped at priority 0.95 (`api/sitemap.js:419`) but only 2 of the 6 have SSR meta handlers:

| Tool path | SSR meta? |
|---|---|
| /tools/signature-licks | ✅ line 394 |
| /tools/kit-builder | ✅ line 416 |
| /tools/gear-search | ❌ falls through |
| /tools/dream-set-builder | ❌ falls through |
| /tools/tier-list | ❌ falls through |
| /tools/name-generator | ❌ falls through |

The 4 missing handlers hit the generic SPA fallback → generic title + no JSON-LD.

## Fix

All 4 handlers added to `api/meta/[...path].js` (lines 597–649).

## Done

- [x] All 4 missing tool pages have keyword-matched SSR titles
- [x] WebApplication schema on gear-search tool
- [x] No fallthrough to generic SPA title for these paths
title: SEO batch: /tools/<slug> individual tool pages missing SSR meta — 4 pages serve generic fallback
